name: Wetouch Technology Inc.
business: Wetouch Technology Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells medium- to large-sized projected capacitive touchscreens ranging from 7.0 to 42 inches. The company's product portfolio includes GG, GFF, PG, and GF types used in financial terminals, automotive, POS, gaming, lottery, medical, HMI, and other specialized industries. For the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024, the company recognized approximately $45.1 million and $42.3 million in revenues, respectively.

exposures.sentence: Touchscreen products for car navigation and entertainment systems take advantage of the popularity of touchscreen consoles in motor vehicles.
Touchscreens in the industrial sector have broad application, and play an important role in industrial HMI.

POS machines are used in a variety of retailers, including in department stores, supermarkets, convenience stores, boutiques, restaurants, hotels, banks, logistics, telecommunication and other service industries.
Product type GFF, mostly used in high-end GPS and entertainment panels, industrial HMI, financial and banking terminals, and the lottery and gaming industry.
The new generation of gambling machines are commonly adopting a touchscreen function.
The self-service lottery ticket vending machine is provided with an operator-oriented touch display device, an input device, a modem, a cash register, printer and security authentication function.
Product type PG, typically adopted by touchscreens in GPS/entertainment panels, motor vehicle GPS, smart home, robotics and charging stations;
Product type PG, typically adopted by touchscreens in GPS/entertainment panels, motor vehicle GPS, smart home, robotics and charging stations;
Product type PG, typically adopted by touchscreens in GPS/entertainment panels, motor vehicle GPS, smart home, robotics and charging stations;
Self-service ticket machines and kiosks contain touchscreen interfaces which are durable and have a long use life.
ATM machines and other similar machines use touchscreens or have a touchscreen function.

catalysts.event: Obtain certificate of land use right for new parcel
catalysts.sentence: We will obtain the certificate of land use right for the new parcel from the local government in the upon the completion of the new facility by the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Complete building construction and commence production at new facility
catalysts.sentence: As of the date of this Annual Report, we estimate to finish the building construction by the first half of 2027 and commence production by the end of 2027.
